channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: 82-0 is the best basketball game, to hell with NBA 2K
item.description: 82-0 marries the stat nerd fun of fantasy basketball with instant gratification and a bit of dumb luck. The goal is to draft a team of players that could (theoretically) have a perfect 82-0 season. Obviously, if you just had free rein to pick whoever you wanted from throughout history, there would be little challenge. […]

item.title: I tried the SteelSeries Nimbus Cloud and feel like it’s just trying to do too much
item.description: The SteelSeries Nimbus Cloud aims to be the only controller you need. A hybrid option that extends to become a USB-C mobile grip and collapses into a standalone Bluetooth gamepad.

item.title: Prep and save for America’s 250th birthday at Walmart — shop deals on grills, decor, games, patio furniture, and more
item.description: America's 250th Birthday is almost here, and Walmart has deals on everything you need to celebrate, including grills, decor, patio furniture, games, and more.

item.title: Samsung Galaxy Book6 Enterprise Edition review: Beautifully engineered business laptop but at this price, I expected better ports than USB 3.2 Gen 2
item.description: The Samsung Galaxy Book6 Enterprise Edition is a heavyweight business laptop that uses Intel’s latest 300 series silicon.

item.title: NASA's Nancy Grace Roman Space Telescope is set to launch on August 30
item.description: NASA is targeting an August 30 launch for the Nancy Grace Roman Space Telescope, which has 100 times Hubble's field of view.

item.title: The Best 3-in-1 Apple Charging Stations After Testing Top Models
item.description: I tried all the top models to find the best 3-in-1 Apple charging stations, pads, and more. Keep your iPhone, Apple Watch, and AirPods topped up with these WIRED-tested docking systems.

item.title: Meta made its own AI-generated clickbait news feed
item.description: Facebook has long been filled with feeds of clickbait articles. Now, Meta is making its own clickbait articles with AI. The standalone Meta AI app now has a "For You" section that populates a list of clickbait-style stories for you to read. But the topics, images, and text are all AI-generated - and as questionable […]

item.title: All the Summer Game Fest showcases you can catch today
item.description: Check out all the Summer Game Fest showcases you can watch today, June 6.

item.title: 4 mises à jour cruciales à faire sur votre PC pour libérer ses performances (BIOS, pilotes, RAM)
item.description: Certaines mises à jour sont plus importantes à faire que d'autres sur votre PC si vous voulez atteindre les meilleures performances. Voici nos quatre recommandations pour atteindre le plein potentiel de votre machine.

item.title: 'Resistance is futile': the 5 most revealing quotes from Computex 2026 — and what they tell us about the future of computing
item.description: Weighty quotes from the likes of Microsoft's Satya Nadella and Nvidia's Jensen Huang, with a Borg-like prediction from Qualcomm's Cristiano Amon.

item.title: The best Kindle alternatives for those looking to ditch Amazon
item.description: Whether you hate subscriptions like Kindle Unlimited or simply want to get away from Amazon for whatever reason, you'll find plenty of solid options available.

item.title: En promo à moins de 500 € : faut-il craquer pour le Google Pixel 10a ou le Samsung Galaxy A57 ?
item.description: Les nouveaux Google Pixel 10a et Samsung Galaxy A57 offrent des prestations solides. Deux milieux de gamme fortement recommandables, d'autant plus qu'ils sont en ce moment en promotion à moins de 500 euros. Mais lequel de ces deux appareils choisir ?

item.title: Cet Airbus peut larguer 3 fois plus d’eau qu’un Canadair : l’Espagne sort l’artillerie lourde
item.description: L'Espagne fait appel à l'Airbus A400M et son kit de 20 000 litres pour mieux lutter contre les feux de forêt. Si nos voisins ibériques misent sur ce sujet, ce choix technique fait débat en France pour des raisons bien précises.

item.title: Kabuto Park captures the fleeting joy of summer vacation
item.description: There are a lot of games that remind me of summer - hot days in the backseat with a copy of Dragon Warrior III, cooling off in the basement while grinding Gran Turismo races - but there aren't a lot of games that are actually about summer. That's part of what makes Kabuto Park so […]

item.title: ‘There’s no better mobile controller at this price point’: I was blown away by the performance of the GameSir X5 Lite — but I hope it fits your hands
item.description: The GameSir X5 Lite focuses on the basics to deliver a solid mobile controller — but how well does it actually game?

item.title: What is the release date for Every Year After on Prime Video?
item.description: There's an Off Campus-shaped hole in our lives... but next week has you covered. When does Every Year After arrive on Prime Video?
